Field index / case 03

TIDE
OBSERVATORY

Move to inspect · drag upward to open

IRIS 42%

Move the pointer to inspect the image through the iris. Press and drag upward or downward to change its opening. Use left and right arrow keys to choose a chapter, up and down to change aperture size, Home to close, or End to open.

p5.js · live iris real generated artwork pixels revealed by a human-controlled p5 aperture
